name: Wind Carry
description: Message caught by wind and carried away

prompts.label: message caught by strong wind and carried swiftly away
prompts.text: message caught by strong wind and carried swiftly away, forest clearing at dawn, wooden mallet on hollow log, morning dew stillness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, with natural decay

prompts.label: leaf letter lifted by gust and sailing over trees
prompts.text: leaf letter lifted by gust and sailing over trees, moss-covered stone garden, rain droplet on broad leaf, sun-warmed earth, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, smooth fade out

prompts.label: dandelion seeds released into purposeful carrying breeze
prompts.text: dandelion seeds released into purposeful carrying breeze, bamboo grove in gentle wind, smooth river stones clinking, birdsong tranquility, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, sustained resonance

prompts.label: paper caught in updraft and spiraling higher
prompts.text: paper caught in updraft and spiraling higher, creek bed after summer rain, fingertip-plucked kalimba tine, deep forest solitude, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, airy, with natural decay

prompts.label: autumn wind snatching sound and running with it
prompts.text: autumn wind snatching sound and running with it, meadow with distant thunder, ceramic wind chime in breeze, waterfall mist on skin, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, soft, smooth fade out
